label: CI/CD Approval Required

scope.intended_use: GitHub Actions, CI, deployment, and release workflow evaluation

actions.description: Allow reading workflow, job, and check status.
Workflow dispatch requires an approval ceremony in a real integration.
Production deploys require explicit approval and receipt capture.
Secret writes are outside the example allow graph.
Release publication is outside the example allow graph.

notes: Example only: approval semantics must be implemented by the active integration and verified by receipts.
